# External Dependencies

This directory contains git submodules for external dependencies.

## Structure

- **openzeppelin-contracts/**: OpenZeppelin contracts (submodule)
- **forge-std/**: Foundry standard library (submodule)
- **erc4626-tests/**: ERC4626 test suite (submodule)

## Management

Submodules are managed via git submodule commands. See root README for initialization instructions.
